name: [GRV-API] SQL Injection Attack Detection
query: logs("service:grv-api env:prod (sql_injection OR union+select OR drop+table OR insert+into OR delete+from OR update+set OR ' OR 1=1 OR \" OR 1=1 OR ' OR 'a'='a OR \" OR \"a\"=\"a)").rollup("count", 300) > 0
message:
Potential SQL injection attack detected for grv-api service.

Environment: {{env}}
Service: {{service}}
Suspicious Requests: {{value}} (last 5 minutes)

IMMEDIATE ACTION REQUIRED:
1. Review application logs
2. Check database for unauthorized changes
3. Block suspicious IP addresses
4. Update WAF rules

Investigate: https://app.datadoghq.com/logs?query=service%3Agrv-api%20env%3Aprod%20sql_injection

options.escalation_message: CRITICAL: SQL injection attacks continuing. Service may be compromised!
